# Pull Request

## Traceability

- US-XXX
- UC-XXX
- S-XXX
- BDD-XXX or TDD-S-XXX

## Summary

- Describe the scope of the change.
- Explain which repository layer is affected.

## Validation

- Describe the checks executed.
- List relevant workflows, tests, or manual verification.

## Residual Risks

- Document any remaining risk, blocker, or follow-up.
